apps.name: Windows Terminal
apps.summary: Microsoft's modern, tabbed terminal host for command-line shells like PowerShell, Command Prompt, and WSL on Windows.

apps.name: WezTerm
apps.summary: GPU-accelerated, cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer configured with Lua, supporting tabs, splits, and ligatures.

apps.name: Alacritty
apps.summary: Cross-platform, OpenGL/GPU-accelerated terminal emulator focused on simplicity and performance.

apps.name: kitty
apps.summary: Fast, feature-rich, GPU-based terminal emulator with tabs, splits, and a graphics protocol.

apps.name: Tabby
apps.summary: Highly configurable, open-source terminal emulator with built-in SSH and serial clients for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

apps.name: PowerShell
apps.summary: Cross-platform automation shell and scripting language from Microsoft (PowerShell 7+, the pwsh successor to Windows PowerShell).

apps.name: Black Box
apps.summary: Native GTK4 terminal emulator for GNOME with strong theming, Sixel rendering, and a clean modern interface.

apps.name: Ptyxis
apps.summary: Container-focused GNOME terminal emulator with podman, toolbox, and distrobox integration, tabs, and profiles.

apps.name: fish
apps.summary: User-friendly interactive Unix shell with autosuggestions, syntax highlighting, and sane defaults out of the box.

apps.name: tmux
apps.summary: Terminal multiplexer that lets you run multiple persistent terminal sessions, windows, and panes from one screen.
